description:
This quiz tests Bash scripting skills with 16 questions covering variables, loops, conditionals, string manipulation, functions, and syntax gotchas. It ranges from basic to tricky difficulty and uses an engaging, slightly humorous tone to challenge learners.
Topics: variables, loops, conditionals, string manipulation, functions, syntax gotchas
Audience: Developers, sysadmins, and anyone looking to test or improve their Bash scripting skills
